ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood group where the listing is located */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the listing is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing's location */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the listing */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings the host has on the platform */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available in a year */,
  "number_of_reviews_ltm" INTEGER /* Number of reviews in the last 12 months */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or permit number for the listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities offered by the listing */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images for the listing */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Is the listing verified by the platform? */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was verified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the listing active? */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the host */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the host is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the host is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the host's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the host is located */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "about" TEXT /* Brief description of the host */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Host's response rate (percentage) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Host's average response time */,
  "is_superhost" INTEGER /* Is the host a superhost? */,
  "superhost_since" TEXT /* Date the host became a superhost */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of reviewer (e.g., guest, host) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "about" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Is the user verified by the platform? */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the user was verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status for the booking (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_group" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood group */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighborhood is located */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price per night for listings in the neighborhood */,
  "avg_availability_365" INTEGER /* Average number of days listings are available in the neighborhood */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the neighborhood */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images for the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
